reviews.review_title: Realistic VR Heights with Fun Jumps🙌
reviews.review_description: This VR experience is really impressive. The environments and scenes look very realistic, and the sense of height feels amazing. Jumping from one building to another is both funny and exciting. The climb is fun and immersive, and reaching the top feels rewarding. Great work by the developers👏hope to see more updates to make the game even more interesting.

Game gives a really strong sense of height in VR. The environments look very realistic and the city view from the top is amazing. Jumping between buildings is fun and sometimes a bit scary in a good way. It’s impressive for a free experience. Great work by the developers—hope they add more levels and challenges.

reviews.review_description: Really fun VR climbing game. The environments look realistic and the height feels amazing. Jumping between buildings is exciting and funny. Great work by the developers. Hope to see more scenes and updates.

This free game is a follow up to my favorite game by this dev. Ultraheight Mist City Climb was an absolute gem when it launched and provided tons of great content in a very modestly priced package. This game continues that trend but with more polish and a nice graphical overhaul. I love the addition of the skyline that honestly adds a much more alive feeling to the city versus the fog barrier from the original game.
Enjoyed going through climbing the buildings and using the parachute. Nice scenery.

Said they got game of the year there’s no way this terrible game got an award like that 

Edit: my bad I didn’t think this could get that I didn’t really take the time to look into it

developer_response.body:
We said it is nominated, look here: https://thepolys.com/#2025-game-of-the-year

reviews.review_description: oh and after you comment on my comment i'll put it back up to three or five if you really want me to okay the games actually not trash i just realized that all the reviews that were put on here only the ones that had bad titles were being commented on and i wanted the devs to read this really bad because i kinda need help a little bit so here is the rest after the edit btw three stars not one with all due respect to this game it looks awesome and as soon as i get in boom cyber city futuristic i look around and i start doing the tutorial and eventually i'm taking too long and i realized there is a time limit so i have to restart which i completely understand here's the part that goes along with my title when i got to a certain point the game just made me restart for absolutely no reason at all i still had it somewhere between 30 seconds to a minute left on my timer plenty of time to keep going but i do love the setting of this game and i think that if i could finish the tutorial i would give it a higher rating but for now three stars because i think this has a great opportunity to be an amazing game just i cannot play it
this game is fun at all what the timer needs to be cuz i'm the tutorial i was stuck on one point because there was no checkpoint

developer_response.body: what  are you trying to say?  You are the tutorial? There is no tutorial. There is always a checkpoint, where did you get stuck? At the end you need to press the red button to get back to menu or get the expansion game.

reviews.review_description:
Ultra Height: Cyber City Climbing is a fun and accessible VR climbing game that quickly delivers the thrill of extreme height. The cyberpunk-inspired city is well designed, with towering skyscrapers, futuristic vehicles, and a strong sense of scale that really sells the vertigo.

The climbing feels intuitive, and when you’re ready to come down, the parachute mechanic is a fantastic addition. Gliding peacefully back to the ground feels surprisingly realistic and polished—on par with much bigger-budget titles. A great experience for anyone who enjoys climbing, heights, or futuristic settings. Definitely worth trying.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Join our discord channel where we also do a giveaway for the full game Ultra Height: Cyber City Climbing https://discord.gg/DmMNyamCpf

reviews.review_description:
I had high hopes for this but I was severely disappointed. Not only did I encounter countless glitches and bugs for the mere 5 minutes I played. But you are also timed in a game where a sloth could walk faster then you when your not sprinting.  The graphics are no where near the quality of the images. This game was rushed and extremely cheaply made. If you really want a tower climbing game get "Vr tower climbing" infinitely better than this.

Edit: to the devs, I appreciate the acknowledgement of my severely negative review. I changed my review from one star to 2 stars for 2 reasons: I felt bad, and the cars look cool. Also it is 100% reasonable to accuse me of promoting my own game on your game. But truth is, I dont make games. Vr tower climbing is a game i found that has the same basic concept of futuristic tower climbing just they did it better with better graphics and a better tutorial. But just one more thing. My old review was extremely negative I understand that but I was simply being brutally honest. Have a good day.

developer_response.body:
STOP ADVERTISING YOUR GAMES BY SPAMMING BAD REVIEWS ON OTHERS OR YOU WILL GET BANNED!

We have worked years on this game and Ultra Height 2, there are no bugs left, stop spreading lies! You are timed cause people were complaining was not challenging enough, and totally doesn't deserve only 1 star.
OH THERE IS SPRINTING if you only look at the instructions! 
Stop advertising our cheap vr tower climbing stuff on here, people will just hate you!

reviews.review_description: Nice game i love it so muchhhhhh.

It took me 15 min to go from start to finish.

Never climb a skyscraper or took a parachute.

When you are on top of the building, you have to climb a flagpole, balance on a plank, and then jump from the skyscraper. Love it.

And the music is great.


Check my gameplay on my YT channel:

https://youtu.be/bQCEFKLklak?si=WkStnhTY8_zLsRPi

We did lots of effort in graphics to make it look like a miami style 2035 cyberpunk city. What do you mean it won't let you stop walking forward? maybe you opened up the parachute and it takes you forward. You can totally grip the skyscraper that you are supposed to climb, just not the other ones. You can see in the trailer and from the videos of other users. Also, the reviewers from meta would only allow functioning games so gripping does work! Many other reviews are from actual content creators, they have seen the game in our discord server, look them up! No ai, you are obviously a troll! Our discord, where you can also see the trailer that is still in approval here: https://discord.gg/Evbn7X36YP

reviews.review_description:
this game in my opinion is not good here are my reasons. Reason 1: it was hard to clime the buildings i keep slipping. Reason 2: the prashot did not work for me.
Reason 3'. The graphics are good i'll give it that.
Finally 2 stars

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the opinion. It is not hard to climb, just press the grip button to lock the hand so it is sticking to the wall and keep it pressed while climbing up, release it to grab the wall further. the parachute is simple, just press the button that opens the parachute once, then again to close it.

reviews.review_title: Great easy to get into game with thrills
reviews.review_description: Want something fun and easy to dive into.  Start racing up a building.  Regardless for your fear of heights, you won’t notice with the pressure to reach the next milestone point.  Graphics need work although it is more about getting you moving then taking photos from the top of a building.

Ultra Height: Cyber City Climbing delivers thrilling vertical gameplay in VR. Climb towering buildings, balance on narrow beams and leap off skyscrapers with precision hand interaction. A unique challenge for fans of climbing and adrenaline-packed experiences.

Height-related climbing games are pretty common in VR, but this one managed to hook me in. Although the geometry is still pretty basic, this game is going through active development and is being upgraded - so I'm hopeful that future updates will enhance the graphics even further. 

Still, the sensation of climbing is very nice and enjoyable, highly recommended to anyone interested in climbing in various locations.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Join our discord channel where we also do a giveaway for the full game Ultra Height: Cyber City Climbing https://discord.gg/DmMNyamCpf

reviews.review_description: I love it that it requires a lot of movement. A workout sometimes for sure. Nothing better than climbing to the top of a skyscraper and admiring the view. Definitely recommend! A peaceful landscape...
Very cool game and nice original soundtracks! You can hear the beats and lyrics are made for this!

reviews.review_title: It is times for the first level
reviews.review_description: I played it once and kept on losing because it is times and times climbing gars aren’t fun.

developer_response.body: We just introduces a cheat mode without times! Try it!

reviews.review_description:
tried it and it’s basically a VR height challenge where you climb a massive skyscraper using your hands while balancing on planks and pipes high above the city. the sense of height is actually pretty crazy plus the timer on the bottom left of your screen triggers constant anxiety making you really hustle to the next checkpoint.

once you reach the top you jump and deploy a parachute to glide back down to the city square, and the view is pretty good ngl, if not for my fear of heights I'd actually enjoy it
climbing the skyscraper and jumping from the top with a parachute feels amazing. simple but very immersive vr experience.
this really makes you feel how high you are. climbing slowly and looking down gave me real vertigo in vr.
Building's and parachuting superr cooool 💯 recommended!!!
Superrr funny & nice physicss
very intense heights
Takes a bit to master the controls but this is a fun and challenging game. Graphics are stylish, as is the soundtrack. Gives you the realistic feel of climbing tall buildings.
